inv_push_ok: Last inventory push (stock/price) completed successfully on the integration.
inv_push_err_permission: The integration or connector does not allow this action.
inv_push_err_connector_disabled: Connector disabled on the external platform.
inv_push_err_not_implemented: The integration does not implement inventory updates for this connector.
inv_push_err_integration: Generic error returned by the integration API.
inv_push_err_product_not_found: The product does not exist on the external platform.
inv_push_err_rate_limit: Rate limit or throttling reported by the integration.
inv_push_err_network: Network failure calling the integration service (timeout, DNS, connection, etc.).
